I love the fact that this movie is telling the story of something that actually happened, WHILE incorporating effects and camera shots that give nods to the gamers! The idea of combining a game adaptation AND a sports drama into one film, is such a unique spin on both genres! 

Also, that clip of Jann in his room and having the car assemble and materialize around him, transitioning to him in the race? That was so fucking cool!! I would LOVE to see the Corridor Crew talk about this movie, especially that specific shot!

Major kudos to those who made this movie. I was skeptical at first, but this trailer alone won me over 🙌❤️😎

The movie... It was so very impactful. Mostly because everything that took place was so "real". Often you go to movies and the people in it are doing things they would never do. An example here was how well they captured the relationship that Jann made with his new mentor and instructor. This movie is about how a man who thought he was done was destined to not only restart his own life, but the life of another as well. This movie should be the foundational program for anyone who wants to become a mentor, a leader and the hope of another human being.

Wow, what can I say about this movie? I just got back from CNN I had a private showing I sat with a bunch of other people probably about 10 of us and a theater of 60 five, and let me tell you. This is the only day they are actually showing at 2. They're not gonna be someone it a guess again until next week. So this was a premiere showing a snake preview..... Wow, what can I say it was intense at times I actually felt like I was in that race car that was a great movie I couldn't see anything wrong with it. That was a really, really good. Movi learned a lot about racing. Wild stuff I didn't know about here I learned about now.  And I don't give spoilers I just say you need to check out this movie yourself. Here I think it's gonna be a top grossing movie. This person is definitely gonna be making a nice bank role of the actual person actually is in the movie itself. There is a stomp person. But wow, it was an excellent movie.  I really enjoyed it tomorrow's the new Dracula movie I can't think of the name of it I can't, I'm tired it's been a long day. It's been a long week. I had a death in the family the other day so I had a funeral so I went to the show today to online and see the premiere showing going to another premiere showing tomorrow and I think another premiere showing Friday so if you want to know what I thought about the other movies.  Um, wake me up, so that's it for tonight. I'm gonna close my eyes for a few minutes. And then I got some things to do. But I just thought i'd give you quick review.
